integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OpenMRS web interface in a browser.

integrity.description: Agent updated the actual application rather than a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Angel Barrows. Target DOB: 1975-03-10. Target Phone Number: 617-555-0143 (digits: 6175550143). Verify that the phone number is updated specifically for this patient's profile in the OpenMRS system.
